attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 SOXSHA.ALERT_STATUS,
 SOXSHA.CASH_RECEIPT_ID,
 SOXSHA.COLLECTOR_ID,
 SOXSHA.COMMENTS,
 SOXSHA.CREATED_BY,
 SOXSHA.CREATION_DATE,
 SOXSHA.EMAIL_ADDRESS,
 SOXSHA.EXCHANGE_DATE,
 SOXSHA.EXCHANGE_RATE,
 SOXSHA.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,
 SOXSHA.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
 SOXSHA.FUNC_SAF_AMOUNT,
 SOXSHA.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
 SOXSHA.GLOBAL_NAME,
 SOXSHA.INITIATOR_GROUP_ID,
 SOXSHA.INITIATOR_ROLE_ID,
 SOXSHA.ITEM_KEY,
 SOXSHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 SOXSHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 SOXSHA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
 SOXSHA.ORG_ID,
 SOXSHA.SAF_AMOUNT,
 SOXSHA.SAF_DATE,
 SOXSHA.SAF_HEADER_ID,
 SOXSHA.SAF_ID,
 SOXSHA.SAF_REASON,
 SOXSHA.SAF_STATUS,
 SOXSHA.SAF_TYPE,
 SOXSHA.SPECIAL_REQUEST,
 SOXSHA.TRAN_CURRENCY_CODE,
 SOXSHA.CREATE_DATETIME,
 SOXSHA.ACTION_CODE,
 SOXSHA.D_ATTRIBUTE1 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCAC_SAF_HDR_ALL_REV SOXSHA 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY GES_UPDATE_DATE ,GLOBAL_NAME ,SAF_HEADER_ID   
  ORDER BY GES_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1
  WHERE NOT EXISTS
  (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCAC_SAF_HEADER EOXSH
WHERE
(
EOXSH.SAF_HEADER_ID=SOXSHA.SAF_HEADER_ID
AND
EOXSH.GLOBAL_NAME=SOXSHA.GLOBAL_NAME)
)

SELECT
 SOXSHA.ALERT_STATUS,
 SOXSHA.CASH_RECEIPT_ID,
 SOXSHA.COLLECTOR_ID,
 SOXSHA.COMMENTS,
 SOXSHA.CREATED_BY,
 SOXSHA.CREATION_DATE,
 SOXSHA.EMAIL_ADDRESS,
 SOXSHA.EXCHANGE_DATE,
 SOXSHA.EXCHANGE_RATE,
 SOXSHA.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,
 SOXSHA.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
 SOXSHA.FUNC_SAF_AMOUNT,
 SOXSHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 SOXSHA.GLOBAL_NAME,
 SOXSHA.INITIATOR_GROUP_ID,
 SOXSHA.INITIATOR_ROLE_ID,
 SOXSHA.ITEM_KEY,
 SOXSHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 SOXSHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 SOXSHA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
 SOXSHA.ORG_ID,
 SOXSHA.SAF_AMOUNT,
 SOXSHA.SAF_DATE,
 SOXSHA.SAF_HEADER_ID,
 SOXSHA.SAF_ID,
 SOXSHA.SAF_REASON,
 SOXSHA.SAF_STATUS,
 SOXSHA.SAF_TYPE,
 SOXSHA.SPECIAL_REQUEST,
 SOXSHA.TRAN_CURRENCY_CODE,
 SOXSHA.CREATE_DATETIME,
 SOXSHA.ACTION_CODE,
 SOXSHA.D_ATTRIBUTE1,
 COALESCE(SOXSHA.N_ATTRIBUTE1,-999) AS N_ATTRIBUTE1,
 COALESCE(SOXSHA.D_ATTRIBUTE2,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS D_ATTRIBUTE2,
 SOXSHA.C_ATTRIBUTE8
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_REV SOXSHA 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME ,GLOBAL_NAME ,SAF_HEADER_ID   
  ORDER BY SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC)=1
  WHERE NOT EXISTS
  (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCAC_SAF_HEADER EOXSH
WHERE
(
EOXSH.SAF_HEADER_ID=SOXSHA.SAF_HEADER_ID
AND
EOXSH.GLOBAL_NAME=SOXSHA.GLOBAL_NAME)
)
